title: Device Home Screen - Device Connected and up to date
scenario: Device Home Screen fails to display all required elements: device name with info icon, green dot with Connected label, device image, quick settings, battery icons, and firmware version
expected: Home screen displays: Device Name (with "i" icon for unencrypted devices or devices with limited support), green dot with "Connected" label, device image, quick settings (if enabled), "..." button, battery icons, and firmware version "X.Y.Z".
